subject: Quick update from the Trump campaign
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Hillary for America, a grassroots campaign of 1
body:
This is bad news | Friend --

We wanted to give you the update here: Donald Trump’s campaign is now saying they’ve raised $2 million in just 12 hours since sending their first-ever fundraising email, according to his son. Trump himself said he would match that haul with $2 million of his own money.

Trump’s supporters just sent us a clear message: They’re ready to step up for their candidate, and we need to take that seriously.

This news comes after Trump reorganized his campaign, brought on a new load of staff, and launched his most direct attacks on Hillary yet.

These folks are trying to right the ship, and we now have two million reasons to believe it's working.

**It’s more important than ever that we hit our fundraising goals for June -- can you help with a donation? We’ll even send you a free sticker to say thanks. Let’s show Trump and his supporters that we're just as committed as they are:** [](http://links.hillaryclinton.com/ctt?kn=7&ms=MjU4MTAzMjgS1&r=MTA3MzIzMDg3NjIwS0&b=0&j=ODIzNTAzMzUzS0&mt=1&rt=0)
Thanks so much -- we can’t do this without you.

Dennis

Dennis Cheng
National Finance Director
Hillary for America

|

name: Rob Portman
subject: I need your help
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Portman for Senate Committee
body:
Ohio desperately needs more leaders like Rob in the Senate. | [](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/36039769:sYzfbdYMN:m:1:1353064270:5574F75324F87C2959516E9F2F2EB883:r)
---
Peter --

I am approaching an urgent deadline and need your help.

It's almost the end of the fundraising quarter, and we are not where we need to be. We still need to raise $10,000 by the end of June in order to protect this Senate seat.

**[Will you chip in $10 to help me defend our Republican Senate majority?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/36039770:sYzfbdYMN:m:1:1353064270:5574F75324F87C2959516E9F2F2EB883:r)**

| [**Chip in $10 >>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/36039770:sYzfbdYMN:m:1:1353064270:5574F75324F87C2959516E9F2F2EB883:r)
---

Republicans currently hold a narrow majority in the Senate, by just four seats. National Democrats have said that the path to winning the Senate Majority runs right through Ohio. They have reserved more in advertising against me than anyone else in the country, and just this month, **Harry Reid's Super PAC has spent more than $3 million attacking me on TV across Ohio.**

**[Peter, will you help me protect the Senate?](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/36039769:sYzfbdYMN:m:1:1353064270:5574F75324F87C2959516E9F2F2EB883:r)** We're working hard -- our grassroots team has contacted more than 2.3 million Ohio voters through our door-to-door and phone programs! But we need your help...

[**Chip in $10 >>**](http://paracom.paramountcommunication.com/ct/36039770:sYzfbdYMN:m:1:1353064270:5574F75324F87C2959516E9F2F2EB883:r)
---

If Ted Strickland succeeds this November, it will be at the expense of Ohioans. That's why meeting our fundraising goal is so important. **Ohio cannot afford a return to Ted Strickland's Ohio when our state lost more than 350,000 jobs and ranked 48th in job creation.**

All best,
Rob Portman

name: Ben Carson
subject: A report on our meeting with Donald Trump:
body:
---
| | [](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/36062405:snXvPdYrN:m:1:876315805:49389B569AC72263A7577382FFAD9EA7:r)
---
* * *

Peter,

Tuesday of this week was a very important day for My Faith Votes and for the country.

We brought together hundreds of our nation's top Christian leaders to meet with Donald Trump for the purpose of getting to know one another's hearts, priorities and concerns directly, rather than through the filter of the biased media.

To help steer the conversation, I reached out to you and many other supporters to gather your questions or comments.

**In all we received over 51,000 responses, proving to all of us here at My Faith Votes that people truly are beginning to get engaged in this election.**

I'd like to report back that two of the topics that received the most discussion were religious freedom and the future of the U.S. Supreme Court.

You'll be happy to know that Mr. Trump was very concerned about restrictions on religious liberty and supported the right of church leaders to speak more forcefully in favor of candidates. He also reiterated his promise to appoint conservative, pro-life Supreme Court justices.

[**After everything wrapped up, I also recorded a short video to give you my feedback on the meeting, and I hope you 'll take a moment to watch now.**](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/36062405:snXvPdYrN:m:1:876315805:49389B569AC72263A7577382FFAD9EA7:r)

I thank you for your participation, and hope that you will [continue to support our work](http://email.bencarson.com/ct/36062405:snXvPdYrN:m:1:876315805:49389B569AC72263A7577382FFAD9EA7:r) as we help to inform Christians about their choices.

Thank you.

Sincerely,

Ben Carson

**

name: Katie McGinty
subject: so much on the line
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Katie McGinty for Senate
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8005739750352748544/5268672803325870080?refcode=e20160623&refcode2=e20160623nd&amount=25)
---
Friend,

We've come a long way together. When I entered this race for Pennsylvania's Senate seat nearly a year ago, we were the underdog. From the ground up, we built a campaign that won a hard fought primary. Then, we turned right around and closed the gap on Pat Toomey with polls showing that we can win this race. When I look back on this journey, I'm blown away.

[**Friend, we can 't stop now -- not with so much on the line.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8005739750352748544/5268672803325870080?refcode=e20160623&refcode2=e20160623nd&amount=25) Not with Toomey's $9 million war chest at his disposal. Not with Toomey's repeated votes against middle class priorities, against keeping Pennsylvanians safe, and for the interests of Wall Street and the Koch brothers.

We can't let his actions stand. But if we want to really make change together, then I'm going to need you right now.

**Today marks one week until the FEC end-of-quarter deadline, our biggest deadline of the general election yet.** On July 1, everyone is going to be looking at our fundraising numbers to see if we have the grassroots support to go up against Toomey, his war chest, and his Super PAC supporters.

[**Will you pitch in $5 to help us reach our ambitious $50,000 end-of-quarter goal so our campaign can finish what we started?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8005739750352748544/5268672803325870080?refcode=e20160623&refcode2=e20160623nd&amount=25)

I've seen what we've done so far. So I know we have the right stuff to win this race. But I need your help to show it.

[**Will you pitch in to help us reach our $50,000 goal before the FEC deadline? Let 's show that this campaign has what it takes to defeat Toomey and stand up for Pennsylvanians.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8005739750352748544/5268672803325870080?refcode=e20160623&refcode2=e20160623nd&amount=25)

Thank you for everything you do,

Katie

| *** A note on donations ***

Katie McGinty is fighting for working families in PA -- but we're up against major special interest spending. If we're going to win this race and take back the Senate, then we need to stand together.

**[Donate Now](https://act.myngp.com/el/-8005739750352748544/5268672803325870080?refcode=e20160623&refcode2=e20160623nd&amount=25 "https://act.myngp.com/el/-8005739750352748544/5268672803325870080?refcode=e20160612&refcode2=e20160612nd&amount=25")**

| [](http://links.mikepence.com/u/723b634c1d754219ace42b46c0a53fd0?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&utm_source=iterable&utm_medium=image_header_logo&utm_term=fundraising_deadline&utm_campaign=eom&utm_content=20160623-my-friend-mike-3611-direct) |
| Friend,

While in office, I have focused on cutting wasteful spending, reducing the national debt, and promoting a pro-growth economic policy to put Hoosiers and Americans back to work.

On a national level, we have not accomplished nearly as much as I would like, but I continue to be impressed by the progress and growth occurring in Indiana – **thanks in large part to having an ally in Governor Mike Pence.**

Mike has truly been a leader for Indiana that has helped the state grow and continue on the path forward to more jobs, more economic opportunity, and more prosperity for all Hoosier families.

In just a few days, Mike is facing a tough deadline – the first big one of the general election. At the end of June, they have to close their books on the 2nd quarter fundraising numbers and release it to the public. [**It would mean a lot to me and it would mean even more to the Pence team if you could contribute $20 today to help my friend Mike get past this deadline.**](http://links.mikepence.com/u/70f173e2998c4f2cafe898723a109d91?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&amount=20&utm_source=iterable&utm_medium=text_body_amount&utm_term=fundraising_deadline&utm_campaign=eom&utm_content=20160623-my-friend-mike-3611-direct)

**We need Mike to continue his commonsense, conservative legacy here in Indiana, and with your help we can do it.[Contribute to Team Pence today.](http://links.mikepence.com/u/4121fa7093dc4593a3421b9db6b6a176?_e=dpwillis67%40gmail.com&utm_source=iterable&utm_medium=text_body_cta&utm_term=fundraising_deadline&utm_campaign=eom&utm_content=20160623-my-friend-mike-3611-direct)**

That's why we're releasing a new web ad today called ["Shameful." ](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv%3DrN_UpV0lqoY&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=shameful_blast&n=1 "Watch "Shameful"") [](https://www.robportman.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.youtube.com%2Fwatch%3Fv%3DrN_UpV0lqoY&e=aa4131f163f0a23ba616fd24e19c0e92&utm_source=robportman&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=shameful_blast&n=2 "Watch "Shameful"")

Retread Ted talks tough on China, but like many things, his record doesn't match his rhetoric. In Congress, he refused to hold China accountable for unfair trade practices. As governor, despite his strong rhetoric, Strickland's administration opened a trade office in China and he even gave a $4 million taxpayer-funded loan to a now-bankrupt company with a Chinese factory.

Rob is the only candidate in this race with a proven record of being tough on China – even opposing his own party to stop China's currency manipulation and protecting Ohio jobs when China cheats. He is a leader when it comes to leveling the playing field on trade so Ohio workers can compete and win.

name: Christina Hale
subject: This is personal
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Gregg for Indiana
body:
We can't win this fight unless we build momentum -- and we need your help.
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/4287725469123872768/-552113665948121088?utm_campaign=adv_prek2_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&ms=em16160621advprek2gqfulch&refcode=em16160621advprek2gqfulch&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=)
---
Peter, For me, the fight for pre-K is personal. During the early years of my son Owen's life, I was a single mother. While struggling to put myself through college at Purdue and working a number of jobs, I worried that he'd be left behind by peers that had access to early education. [](https://act.myngp.com/el/4287725469123872768/-552113665948121088?utm_campaign=adv_prek2_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&ms=em16160621advprek2gqfulch&refcode=em16160621advprek2gqfulch&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=) But I was lucky. Generous friends and neighbors in Michigan City -- who saw me struggle -- helped me find an early education program that would enroll Owen, and gave him a jump start on his education. Over a decade later, Owen's now on his way to becoming even more successful than his mother. But I can't help but wonder what would have happened if we didn't have the support of a community that was willing to give him a chance. I don't want to wonder what will happen to the next generation of Indiana kids who don't have the chance to go to pre-Kindergarten education programs -- especially when it's within our reach to make pre-K available to all. Today, I had the opportunity to visit an early childhood center in Lafayette to talk about the difference early learning opportunities can make in a child's life. It was so wonderful to see little boys and girls who remind me of Owen, and to meet the educators who do this crucial work. I'm proud to be joining John Gregg and Glenda Ritz in fighting to give every child in Indiana access to pre-K. But we can't win this fight unless we build momentum now. **[Please, add your name and tell Indiana leaders:"Every Hoosier child deserves access to pre-K education!"](https://act.myngp.com/el/4287725469123872768/-552113665948121088?utm_campaign=adv_prek2_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&ms=em16160621advprek2gqfulch&refcode=em16160621advprek2gqfulch&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=)** Thanks for your help in fighting for our kids. It means more to me than you know. Christina Hale
| | [**Add your name ->**](https://act.myngp.com/el/4287725469123872768/-552113665948121088?utm_campaign=adv_prek2_&utm_medium=email&utm_source=gregg&ms=em16160621advprek2gqfulch&refcode=em16160621advprek2gqfulch&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=Peter&lastname=)

subject: #disarmhate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Van Hollen for US Senate
body:
|
Friend, after a long, late evening sitting-in on the House floor, Chris and his Democratic colleagues are still fighting even after Paul Ryan and the Republicans left town in the dead of night.

Chris spoke again in the House chamber early this morning demanding Republicans permit a vote on commonsense gun legislation in the light of day. The American people deserve no less.

[**Click here to show Chris and his Democratic partners in the House that you 're with them and sitting by them >>>**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91dd9/70cdc2ba/47f20c41/397207d/435953887/VEsH/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/tell-house-democrats-you-re-sitting-in-with-them-?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=1+-+Click+here+to+show+Chris+and+his+Democra&utm_campaign=em062316&source=em062316") _Begin forwarded message:_
> Friend, the horrific attack on the LGBT community in Orlando last week shocked and outraged us all. But this week we saw something nearly as shocking. The refusal of the GOP to act on commonsense gun safety measures that would help put an end to the epidemic of gun related violence in our communities.
>
> Last week Senate Democrats held a 15-hour filibuster to force Senate Republicans to call a vote on legislation that would make our country a safer place. Then on Monday Senate Republicans blocked all four gun reform measures. But that's not the end of this fight.
>
> Right now my Democratic colleagues and I are leading a sit-in on the House floor to demand a House vote to curb gun violence once and for all. We cannot give up on this. We have to increase the pressure on Republicans until they are forced to represent the interests of the American people, not the gun lobby.
>
> Please 'sit in' with us today by adding your name:[**http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/tell-house-democrats-you-re-sitting-in-with-them-**](http://action.vanhollen.org/page/m/2de91dd9/70cdc2ba/47f20c41/397207a/435953887/VEsE/ "http://action.vanhollen.org/page/s/tell-house-democrats-you-re-sitting-in-with-them-?utm_medium=email&utm_source=cvanhollen&utm_content=2+-++httpactionvanhollenorgpagestellhousedem&utm_campaign=em062316&source=em062316")
>
> Chris

name: Bernie Sanders
subject: What do you want?
body:
#
Sisters, Brothers, and Friends,
A big reason for our tremendous success throughout our campaign has been because we have clearly articulated a vision for the future of America that encompasses social justice, economic justice, racial justice, and environmental justice.
This vision is not only what I want -- it's what the 12 million Americans who voted for a political revolution want. You want real change in this country, you want it now and are prepared to take on the political cowardice and powerful special interests which have prevented that change from happening.
One place we think the agenda of these 12 million Americans should be reflected is in the official platform of the Democratic Party.
[**What issues do you want to be the focus of the Democratic Party platform? Tell us the issues you think should be included.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/Democratic-party-platform?source=em160623-full "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/Democratic-party-platform?source=em160623-full")
**[TELL US YOUR DEMOCRATIC PARTY PLATFORM PRIORITIES»](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/Democratic-party-platform?source=em160623-full "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/Democratic-party-platform?source=em160623-full")**
We aren't afraid to think big, and our agenda shows it. It is possible to transform America into a country that unquestionably works for working families and not the billionaire class. Together, we have called for a $15 minimum wage, a Medicare-for-all single payer health care system, breaking up the big banks, free tuition at public colleges, a ban on fracking, a carbon tax, and so much more.
The platform matters because it is a document that enshrines the values and goals of the Democratic Party. It's a document to which we can point and say, "This is what we believe, and this is what we fight for."
And so the Democratic Party has a choice in the coming weeks, and that choice is whether or not to embrace a bold, fearless, progressive platform that has the potential to transform our country for generations.
We need to hear from you about what you think the most important issues are that should be included in the platform.
[**Tell us what you think should be the priorities of the Democratic Party's platform.**](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/Democratic-party-platform?source=em160623-full "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/Democratic-party-platform?source=em160623-full")
We're taking our campaign, our values, and our movement to the Democratic convention in Philadelphia. We're excited to bring your thoughts on the party platform too. Thanks for being a part of it.
In solidarity,
Bernie Sanders
[Contribute](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/political_revolution?refcode=em160623 "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/political_revolution?refcode=em160623")

PO Box 905 - Burlington VT 05402 United States - (855) 4-BERNIE
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is one of the most important tools we have to reach supporters like you, but you can let us know if you'd like to [receive fewer emails](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902 "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/s/fewer-emails?source=email_footer&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=20902"). We'd hate to see you go, but if you need to do so, click here to [unsubscribe](https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/ "https://go.berniesanders.com/page/unsubscribe/"). Stand against the powerful special interests who are systematically buying our Congress and have their sights set on the presidency by [contributing to Bernie here](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/lets-go-bernie?refcode=email_footer").
